title: Add pytest for ICMPv6/UDP malformed drop verification
description: Add focused parametrized pytest tests in python/tests/ipv6/test_icmpv6.py, test_udp.py and/or test_vectors.py, test_packet_coap.py, test_protocol.py. Verify packets are dropped (PacketError/Icmpv6Error/UdpError raised, no upper layer leak, no crash). Use vectors from previous subbead. Cover new validation paths. Independent oracle (e.g. manual checksum calc, RFC-defined rejects).
close_reason: Implemented parametrized malformed packet drop tests using vectors; verified raises/drops with independent checksum/length oracles; lint and tests pass
